title: notion DBを見ても、800字未満のdraftが多いので、もう一度マルチエージェントで点検し、修正せよ
summary_text: 1. **`X_AUTO_THUMB_TEXTLESS=0` is effectively ignored for NB2 prompts.** `TEXTLESS_MODE` is used as a flag, but both prompt builders still unconditionally ban all text, so turning textless mode off does not actually re-enable text output behavior. [generate-images-nb2.js](/Users/masayuki/.codex/worktrees/54dd/x-auto/scripts/generate-images-nb2.js#L33) [generate-images-nb2.js](/Users/masayuki/.codex/worktrees/54dd/x-auto/scripts/generate-images-nb2.js#L117) [generate-images-nb2.js](/Users/masayuki/.codex/worktrees/54dd/x-auto/scripts/generate-images-nb2.js#L151) 2. **Default `TEXTLESS_MODE` makes the long-form prompt path unreachable, causing a hidden behavior shift.** Because `if (TEXTLESS_MODE || pillar === 3 || textLen <= 400)` short-circuits by default, the long-form branch is never used in normal operation; this is a major behavioral change versus prior long-form prompt logic. [generate-images-nb2.js](/Users/masayuki/.codex/worktrees/54dd/x-auto/scripts/generate-images-nb2.js#L127) 3. **Fallback no longer carries post-specific signal in default mode, increasing generic output risk.** In HTML fallback, default textless mode removes badge/hook/subtitle/author blocks entirely, while the remaining scene is mostly static decorative geometry; this can collapse distinct posts into visually similar outputs. [thumbnail-templates.js](/Users/masayuki/.codex/worktrees/54dd/x-auto/scripts/thumbnail-templates.js#L21) [thumbnail-templates.js](/Users/masayuki/.codex/worktrees/54dd/x-auto/scripts/thumbnail-templates.js#L362) 4. **“Photoreal default” is not true under fallback path.** The fallback generator is an HTML/CSS template system (gradients/patterns), not a photoreal renderer, so default behavior diverges from “textless photoreal” whenever NB2 is unavailable. [thumbnail-templates.js](/Users/masayuki/.codex/worktrees/54dd/x-auto/scripts/thumbnail-templates.js#L3) [thumbnail-templates.js](/Users/masayuki/.codex/worktrees/54dd/x-auto/scripts/thumbnail-templates.js#L147)
